title: 3 Pack Glass Apothecary Jars with Lids, 25oz Clear Bathroom Accessories Canisters Storage Organizer, Cotton Ball Holder Containers, Glass Jars for Bathroom, Vanity, Laundry Room
description:
About this item
Set Includes: Each set has 3 pcs glass bathroom storage jars with sealed lids [Dimensions: 3.8’’ Diameter, 7.3’’ Height], comes with 1 sponge brush and 10 pcs black chalkboard labels.
High Quality & Practical Design: Made of thick and heavy duty glass, BPA-free and lead-free, durable and reusable. With a wide mouth and straight cylinder design, this glass jar is easy to fill, take out and clean. High-transparency glass construction allows you to see the contents inside, making it easy to find what you need and check the remaining quantity.
Excellent Sealing Performance: Each glass container set is equipped with a silicone gasket on the lid to create an airtight environment, protecting the items inside from dust and moisture. TIPS: To easily open the jar, you need to grab it with one hand and pull the rounded glass knob at the top with the other hand.
Ideal Size Storage Containers: With the perfect size, these canisters can better organize your restroom, bathroom, vanity, laundry room, bedroom, saving your countertop much space while adding a touch of elegance to your decor! Great for facial pads, cotton balls, bath salts, bath bombs, soaps, scented wax melts, makeup brushes, beauty eggs, face brushes and more.
Decorative Jars: These glass canisters are the ideal decorations for various events, like weddings, birthday parties, Christmas, and other special occasions. They can be used to display flowers, seashells or stones. You can decorate these jars by adding ribbons or bows to complement the occasion's theme, making them an eye-catching and distinctive decoration!
› See more product details
